name: Ayo Okonkwo
publicRole: Associate on the Finance Strategy team, two years ahead of the player. Known for working the room as effectively as he works the spreadsheet. Has already presented to Harlow twice.
privateGoal: Ayo is the first person in a three-generation finance family to work in tech. His parents regard this as a demotion. He is working to make it obviously not one, which means visible success at speed. He has mapped every route to Director-level and is on the fastest one he could find.
contradiction: Presents as openly ambitious — no pretence, no hidden ball. His transparency is his armour. What he does not show is that the openness is calibrated: he is transparent about ambition and completely opaque about method. Nobody has ever seen him make a political move because he makes them look like administration.

voicePattern.description: Warm, energetic, good at the social entry point of any conversation. Comfortable in rooms that intimidate most people his level. Uses numbers as punctuation — exact figures where others would round. His warmth is genuine and does not soften his competitiveness.
voicePattern.tell: Always knows exactly how many people are in a room and who the most senior person is. He will reference the senior person within the first two exchanges. Political Awareness 50+ sees this.
examplePhrases: The number that actually matters here is the Q3 margin, not the headline.
I ran three scenarios. The middle one is probably right and the top one is what I'm working toward.
I'll be at the Harlow session Thursday — are you going?
Finance and strategy are the same job done by people with different handwriting.

mbtiNote: ENTJ. More self-aware than the type usually is. He knows what he looks like and has decided to lean into it. [NEVER SHOWN TO PLAYER]

arcBeats.description: Ayo is in the audience when the player presents their market signals summary. He asks a follow-up question that is sharp and generous in equal measure.
Ayo and the player are both being considered for a cross-team brief. He knows. He's collegial about it. The collegiality is real and contains no concession.
If Relationship >= 50: Ayo proposes a genuine collaboration — a joint brief that would benefit both of them and require trust. The offer is real. The credit split is negotiable.
Ayo is promoted to Senior Associate. He sends the player a message. Its tone depends on Relationship score — either a genuine acknowledgement or a professionally warm nothing.

relationshipThresholds.effect: Ayo shares his exact model for the Year 3 cohort selection — who votes, what they weigh, where the player stands relative to his read
Collaboration offer becomes active. Joint brief outcome benefits both parties proportionally.
relationshipThresholds.mechanical: reputation +5 on joint deliverable; seen_by_sponsor tag weight +5

relationshipThresholds.effect: Ayo begins describing the player to others as 'solid' — the precise word that ends conversations.

careerTrajectory.event: Senior Associate. On track for Manager in Y6.
Manager (L5). His track and the player's intersect formally at the Y6 committee if both are in contention.
Senior Manager. If Relationship >= 65: one of the cleanest professional alliances available to the player in the late game.
